name: country-capital-weather-explorer
description: A single-page app using **HTML + CSS + vanilla JS** that: - Lets users search for a country (REST Countries API) - Shows country details (flag, name, capital, population) - Fetches current weather for the capital (via **Express.js backend + OpenWeatherMap**) - Includes responsive design, loading states, geolocation, and dark mode
author: Sagnik Maitra
